---
name: Map Data Update
about: Report outdated or missing data in the deep map
title: "[Map] "
labels: map, data
---

**Which tool/CDN?** (e.g., npm, pip, cloudflare)

**What changed?**
- [ ] IP addresses rotated
- [ ] New domain added
- [ ] Certificate changed
- [ ] New tool needs mapping
- [ ] Other

**Details**
Include `dig` output, source links, or other evidence.
